segments.text: I was inspired by Brazilian players, Zico, my idol, played for Flamengo, and I was
completely inspired by him and I was thinking about to be a football player
and whatever it costs. So I had so many opportunities to become a football player
and against my mom and my father that said you have to go to school and well
until 15 years old like I went to school but after that I became so famous that
I couldn't study in the school I was only taking pictures and I was already
famous at 15 years old at Cusero and against my mom and my father and I gave
everything to to became a football player
